name: Notion AI Content Generator
description: Searches Notion for existing pages on a topic, uses Claude AI to generate new content (articles, documentation, summaries) informed by existing knowledge, and creates a new Notion page with the generated content. Adapted from n8n's Notion AI assistant generator workflow.

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for searching and creating pages

notionParentPageId.description: Notion parent page ID where the new content will be created

topic.description: Topic or title for the content to generate (e.g. 'Onboarding guide for new engineers')

contentType.description: Type of content to generate: article, documentation, summary, how-to, FAQ

tone.description: Tone of the generated content: professional, casual, technical, friendly

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting notification

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the completion notification

steps.name: Search Notion for existing pages on the topic
Extract existing page titles and summaries
Build Claude prompt for content generation
Build Notion page blocks from AI content
Create new Notion page with generated content
Build Slack notification for new content
